sources.title: Dataset of personal invoices and receipts including annotation of relevant fields
sources.notes: 190 invoice/receipt images with annotation files. Useful as a small public benchmark source for total/tax/date/reference fields.

sources.title: CORD: A Consolidated Receipt Dataset for Post-OCR Parsing
sources.notes: Receipt-focused dataset with structured total/subtotal/tax-style labels. Language is not within the final claim boundary, so use for breadth and structure testing rather than direct locale proof.

sources.title: FATURA Dataset
sources.notes: 10,000 generated invoice images with JSON annotations. Good public invoice-structure source; synthetic by design, so not a replacement for private real-doc validation.
